en: Here is a link to the guide for querying and printing the social insurance participation certificate for companies.\nhttps://si.12333.gov.cn/251544.jhtml?menuguide=1
Is your company required to comply with the Work-Related Injury Insurance in China?
The certificate must be issued within 3 months prior to the submission date.
Please upload a current copy of your Social Insurance Payment Certificate (社会保险缴费证明).
